note: Beds, furniture, sheets, pads, pillows and integrated bases are priced live from the Sleep Number Storefront REST API. Bases, delivery, warranty, tax and compatibility are curated from researched live data (some are not exposed as API price endpoints).

types.name: Essential
types.blurb: Adjustable foam smart beds (each side 0-100) with SleepIQ tracking.

types.name: Advanced
types.blurb: Enhanced comfort + edge support, FlexFit adjustable-base ready.

types.name: Climate
types.blurb: Temperature-balancing beds - ClimateCool cools; Climate360 heats + cools.

climate.name: Integrated Base
climate.desc: Required base. Per-size pricing from live API.

Climate360 Smart Bed.name: Integrated FlexFit base (included)
Climate360 Smart Bed.note: Climate360 is an all-in-one - its adjustable base is built in and included in the bed price.

hardware.name: Retainer Bar
hardware.desc: Keeps mattress in place on adjustable bases.

hardware.name: Bunkie Board
hardware.desc: Rigid support panel for slatted/platform frames.

hardware.name: Multi-Fit Headboard Bracket
hardware.desc: Attach a headboard to a smart bed frame.

hardware.name: Adjustable Base Headboard Bracket
hardware.desc: Attach a headboard to an adjustable base.

delivery.name: Doorstep Delivery
delivery.desc: Curbside / doorstep drop-off (accessories & bedding ship free).

delivery.name: In-Home Delivery & Setup
delivery.desc: Professional in-home delivery, setup and packaging removal for your smart bed.

delivery.name: In-Home Setup + Mattress Removal
delivery.desc: In-home setup plus haul-away of one old mattress.

disposalFees.name: Old base / foundation haul-away
disposalFees.desc: Remove an old foundation or adjustable base.

deliveryNote: No delivery promotion is currently active. In-home setup is the standard option for smart beds.

warranty.name: 15-Year Limited Warranty
warranty.desc: Standard on all smart beds - included at no charge.

warranty.name: Adjustable Base Limited Warranty
warranty.desc: 2-year full + limited coverage on adjustable bases - included.

warrantyNote: No paid extended warranty is offered on smart beds; the 15-year limited warranty is included.

promos.name: Military / First Responder
promos.description: 5% off for verified active military, veterans, and first responders.
